ogTitle: Holroyd vs Holts Flat: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Holroyd and Holts Flat.
heading: Holroyd vs Holts Flat — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Holroyd, New South Wales and Holts Flat, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Holroyd has a lower overall climate risk score (40/100) compared to Holts Flat (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Holroyd or Holts Flat safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Holroyd has a flood risk score of 55/100, while Holts Flat scores 54/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Holroyd scores 16/100 for bushfire risk. Holts Flat scores 65/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Holroyd or Holts Flat?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Holroyd has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.67% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
